body:
## Rationale

Charlie Benante's album data (`packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/charlie-benante.js`) has: Among the Living (1987), State of Euphoria (1988), Sound of White Noise (1993). Two landmark early albums are **MISSING** from BEFORE Among the Living:

- **Spreading the Disease (1985)** — Benante's Anthrax debut recording. Track 'Madhouse' is one of the most-cited Anthrax songs. LLM hook: 'What was the first Anthrax album with Charlie Benante?' Opens the full arc before Among the Living.
- **Persistence of Time (1990)** — Final album of the Joey Belladonna I era. 'Got the Time' / 'In My World'. Fills the State of Euphoria → Sound of White Noise arc. Platinum US.

**Confirmed MISSING:** `grep 'spreading-the-disease\|persistence-of-time' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/charlie-benante.js` → no results. Not in any open proposals.

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/charlie-benante.js` — append 2 album article objects
- `public/llms/articles/spreading-the-disease-drum-setup.md`
- `public/llms/articles/persistence-of-time-drum-setup.md`

## Data shape (follow existing charlie-benante.js entries)
```js
{
  slug: 'spreading-the-disease-drum-setup',
  albumTitle: 'Spreading the Disease',
  artistName: 'Anthrax',
  year: 1985,
  drummerName: 'Charlie Benante',
  drummerSlug: 'charlie-benante',
  description: '...',
  sections: [...],
  gear: { ... },
  faqs: [{ q: '...', a: '...' }, ...],  // ≥3 Q&A
}
```

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words per article
- ≥3 FAQ Q&A pairs
- ≥3 internal links each (→ /drummer/charlie-benante + adjacent Anthrax articles)
- FAQPage + Person JSON-LD schema
- LLM markdown file 200-300 words

## Estimated organic uplift
- Serves 'charlie benante drum kit 1985', 'anthrax spreading the disease drums', 'madhouse drum setup' clusters
- Opens full Benante Anthrax arc from debut — LLM coherence for 'What was the first Anthrax album?' / 'What drums did Charlie Benante use on early Anthrax?'
- Expected: 15-25 new impressions/week within 30 days

## Source GSC query bucket
Feeds 'charlie benante drum setup' / 'anthrax drummer gear' head terms.

## Verify
1. `grep 'spreading-the-disease-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/charlie-benante.js` → hit
2. `grep 'persistence-of-time-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/charlie-benante.js` → hit
3. `ls public/llms/articles/ | grep -E 'spreading-the-disease|persistence-of-time'` → 2 files
4. Pages render at /articles/spreading-the-disease-drum-setup and /articles/persistence-of-time-drum-setup
5. FAQPage schema validates in Rich Results Test

## Done
Two articles live: /articles/spreading-the-disease-drum-setup and /articles/persistence-of-time-drum-setup — each ≥300 words, ≥3 FAQ, ≥3 internal links, schema, LLM file present.
title: SEO batch: Anthrax 'Spreading the Disease' (1985) + 'Persistence of Time' (1990) drum setup articles (Charlie Benante — opens arc before Among the Living, ~2 articles + 2 LLM files)
